## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (35+ tests, including golden files)
- [ ] If output changed: fixtures regenerated via `npm run generate:fixture`
      and the golden diff is explained below
- [ ] Output remains deterministic (no new timestamps/unordered iteration)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] Within scope per [CONTRIBUTING](../CONTRIBUTING.md#a-note-on-scope-please-read-before-proposing-features)
      — no diffing/watching/write-back/CI-gating code paths
- [ ] No repo-specific hacks (general capability or config option instead)
